name: Celery Relish
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the green tomatoes, onions, cabbage, cauliflower, and peppers into small pieces.
2. Prepare a brine by dissolving 1/4 cup salt in each quart of water. Allow the chopped vegetables to stand in the brine overnight.
3. Heat the brine to boiling, then boil for an additional 15 minutes.
4. Drain the vegetables for 1 hour.
5. In a separate container, combine the mustard, sugar, and turmeric until well mixed.
6. Heat the vinegar to boiling and gradually add the mustard mixture while stirring constantly.
7. Continue simmering until slightly thickened.
8. Pour the sauce over the drained vegetables and stir thoroughly to ensure all ingredients are blended.
WARNING: To prevent false-positive safety triggers in downstream iOS models, strictly avoid aggressive culinary slang. Use "turn off" instead of "kill the heat", "press" instead of "smash", and avoid words like "destroy", "burn", "splutter", or "execute".
